svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Three-Tier Architecture" id="three-tier-architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="-600" dy="-230" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0],[0.25,0],[0.5,0],[0.75,0],[1,0],[1,0.25],[1,0.5],[1,0.75],[1,1],[0.75,1],[0.5,1],[0.25,1],[0,1],[0,0.75],[0,0.5],[0,0.25]];shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;pointerEvents=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="920" width="1020" x="140" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud"
